heading: Omitted
label: 44, 45 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 44, R.S. § 2341; , , provided for extension of provisions of Homestead laws to citizens of United States who had prior to 1874 located on lands designated prior to 1866 as mineral lands, and improved them for agricultural purposes, provided no valuable mineral deposits had been discovered thereon.act Mar. 3, 1891, ch. 561, § 426 Stat. 1097Section 45, R.S. § 2342; , , provided for setting apart the lands as agricultural.act Mar. 3, 1891, ch. 561, § 426 Stat. 1097
amendments: CodificationSection 44, R.S. § 2341; , , provided for extension of provisions of Homestead laws to citizens of United States who had prior to 1874 located on lands designated prior to 1866 as mineral lands, and improved them for agricultural purposes, provided no valuable mineral deposits had been discovered thereon.act Mar. 3, 1891, ch. 561, § 426 Stat. 1097Section 45, R.S. § 2342; , , provided for setting apart the lands as agricultural.act Mar. 3, 1891, ch. 561, § 426 Stat. 1097
